@@ -188,7 +188,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-e6b","title":"Implement transcript processor (lib/transcript/processor.ts) -- Details: processTranscript(rawJsonl) extracts messages, detects sections via heuristics (ultrathink=deep thinking, clusters of Edit tools=implementation), calculates stats (messages, toolCalls, filesEdited, linesWritten, tokensUsed).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:15.894389397-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:46:46.259326184-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:46:46.259326184-05:00","close_reason":"Processor already implemented in processor.ts with full functionality","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-e6b","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rq8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:10.160658524-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-e7fj","title":"Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-viz. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance across the application. ## Why This Matters - Legal requirement in many jurisdictions - Better UX for all users - Improves SEO and usability - From README: "We optimize for an elite UX" ## Accessibility Requirements ### 1. Keyboard Navigation - All interactive elements focusable via Tab - Focus indicators visible and high-contrast - Logical tab order following visual layout - Keyboard shortcuts documented - No keyboard traps (can always escape modals) ### 2. Screen Reader Support - Semantic HTML elements (nav, main, aside, etc.) - ARIA labels on interactive elements - ARIA live regions for dynamic content - Meaningful alt text for images - Form labels associated with inputs ### 3. Color & Contrast - 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text - 3:1 contrast ratio for large text - Color not sole indicator (use icons + text) - Focus indicators meet contrast requirements - Dark mode meets same requirements ### 4. Forms & Inputs - Labels visible and associated - Error messages clear and accessible - Required fields indicated - Validation errors announced - Focus moves to first error on submit ### 5. Responsive & Zoom - Content readable at 200% zoom - No horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport - Touch targets at least 44x44px on mobile - Text resizes without breaking layout ## Implementation ### Focus Management ```typescript // src/lib/focus.ts export function focusTrap(container: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function moveFocusTo(element: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function announceToScreenReader(message: string) { /* ... */ } ``` ### Skip Link ```typescript // In layout.tsx Skip to main content
``` ### ARIA Live Region ```typescript // src/components/ui/live-region.tsx export function LiveRegion({ message }: { message: string }) { return (
{message}
); } ``` ### Accessibility Audit Component ```typescript // In development only import { axe } from '@axe-core/react'; if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') { axe(React, ReactDOM, 1000); } ``` ## Testing Requirements - Automated tests with axe-core - Manual testing with VoiceOver/NVDA - Keyboard-only navigation testing - Color contrast checking - Responsive testing at various sizes ## Files to Create - `src/lib/accessibility/focus.ts` - `src/lib/accessibility/announce.ts` - `src/components/ui/skip-link.tsx` - `src/components/ui/live-region.tsx` - `e2e/accessibility/a11y.spec.ts` ## Dependencies ```json { "@axe-core/react": "^4.0.0", "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.0.0" } ``` ## Checklist by Component Type ### Buttons - [ ] Has accessible name (text or aria-label) - [ ] Focus visible - [ ] Keyboard activatable ### Modals/Dialogs - [ ] Focus trapped - [ ] Escape closes - [ ] Focus returns on close - [ ] role="dialog" + aria-labelledby ### Forms - [ ] Labels associated - [ ] Errors announced - [ ] Required indicated - [ ] Autocomplete attributes ## Success Criteria - Passes axe automated testing - Keyboard navigation works throughout - Screen reader announces all content - Color contrast meets requirements - Focus management works correctly ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:56.113962088-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:56.113962088-05:00"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ear","title":"Implement hash embedder fallback (search/hash-embedder.ts) -- Details: hashEmbed(input, dims=128) creates deterministic vector via fast hash. Used when MiniLM unavailable. Provides approximate similarity without model download. No external deps.","notes":"Added deterministic hash embedder fallback and exported it","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:44.255150843-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.538655859-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.538658875-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: hashEmbedding(text, dims=128) in semantic.ts using LSH with char n-grams. Verified working: deterministic, 128 dims, normalized vectors. Exported from search/index.ts."} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","title":"Implement spam prevention for community content","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-7g3z. ## Task Implement spam prevention mechanisms for user-generated content. ## Why This Matters - Protect quality of Swap Meet - Prevent abuse of platform - Maintain user trust - Legal protection ## Spam Prevention Layers ### 1. Rate Limiting - Max prompts per hour: 10 - Max prompts per day: 50 - Burst protection - Per-user limits ### 2. Content Filtering - Block known spam patterns - URL spam detection - Excessive capitalization - Repeated characters - Known bad words ### 3. New User Restrictions - First 24 hours: limited posting - First 7 days: moderation queue - Earn trust over time ### 4. Automated Detection - AI-based spam scoring (optional) - Pattern matching - Similarity to known spam - Link density analysis ### 5. User Reporting - Report spam button - Quick review queue - User reputation impact ### 6. Account Health Score - Based on: reports, quality, engagement - Low score = more scrutiny - High score = less friction ## Implementation ### Content Check Service ```typescript interface SpamCheckResult { isSpam: boolean; confidence: number; reasons: string[]; requiresReview: boolean; } async function checkContent(content: string, userId: string): Promise ``` ### Moderation Queue - Content flagged for review - Admin approve/reject - Learn from decisions ## Database ```typescript export const contentFlags = pgTable("content_flags", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), contentId: text("content_id").notNull(), contentType: text("content_type").notNull(), flagType: text("flag_type").notNull(), // spam, abuse, copyright reportedBy: uuid("reported_by").references(() => userProfiles.id), status: text("status").default("pending"), reviewedBy: uuid("reviewed_by"), createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(), }); ``` ## Files to Create - src/lib/moderation/spam-check.ts - src/lib/moderation/content-filter.ts - src/app/api/moderation/report/route.ts - src/components/moderation/report-button.tsx ## Success Criteria - Spam blocked effectively - False positives low - Legitimate users unaffected - Easy to review/appeal ## UX & Fairness Additions - Provide transparent feedback when content is flagged (reason + appeal path). - Add soft-block state for borderline content (visible to author only). - Log moderation decisions for model tuning and dispute handling. ## Test Coverage - Unit: spam scoring thresholds + pattern filters - Integration: moderation queue creation + review actions - E2E: jeffreysprompts_premium-gx6z (spam + reporting + moderation) ","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:18:50.374169205-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T12:19:03.440919579-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ro6f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.307523545-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-l87c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.434463797-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","title":"Implement spam prevention for community content","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-7g3z. ## Task Implement spam prevention mechanisms for user-generated content. ## Why This Matters - Protect quality of Swap Meet - Prevent abuse of platform - Maintain user trust - Legal protection ## Spam Prevention Layers ### 1. ``` ## Files to Create - src/lib/moderation/spam-check.ts - src/lib/moderation/content-filter.ts - src/app/api/moderation/report/route.ts - src/components/moderation/report-button.tsx ## Success Criteria - Spam blocked effectively - False positives low - Legitimate users unaffected - Easy to review/appeal ## UX & Fairness Additions - Provide transparent feedback when content is flagged (reason + appeal path). - Add soft-block state for borderline content (visible to author only). - Log moderation decisions for model tuning and dispute handling. ## Test Coverage - Unit: spam scoring thresholds + pattern filters - Integration: moderation queue creation + review actions - E2E: jeffreysprompts_premium-gx6z (spam + reporting + moderation) ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:18:50.374169205-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T12:21:27.34792792-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T12:21:27.34792792-05:00","close_reason":"Added spam-check heuristics, content filter, moderation report alias, and support flow auto-flagging","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ro6f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.307523545-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-l87c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.434463797-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-esn","title":"Implement skills manifest.json tracking -- Details: manifest.json in each skills dir tracks: id, kind (prompt/bundle), version, updatedAt, hash. install/update/uninstall update manifest. Only overwrites x_jfp_generated skills without --force.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:10.89256467-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:06.641548997-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:06.641548997-05:00","close_reason":"Manifest system already implemented in packages/cli/src/lib/manifest.ts with SkillManifestEntry, hash computation, modification detection, upsert/remove operations"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-evp","title":"Build MessageDetail component -- Details: Full message display with avatar, timestamp, copy button. Extended thinking accordion. Code block syntax highlighting (react-syntax-highlighter). ToolCallDisplay with expandable input/output. Highlight annotation cards.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:18.08143194-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:59:27.828979131-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:59:27.828979131-05:00","close_reason":"MessageDetail component already implemented","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-evp","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:11.069527589-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ezv2","title":"Implement changelog and what's new feature","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-xj4e. ## Task Implement a changelog to communicate new features and updates to users. ## Why This Matters - Users know about new features - Reduces "I didn't know you could do that" - Shows product is actively developed - Marketing opportunity ## Components ### 1. Changelog Page - /changelog - Public page - Chronological list of updates - Categories: New, Improved, Fixed - Date for each entry - SEO-friendly ### 2. What's New Modal - Shown to users after update - Highlights major changes - Dismissible (remember dismissal) - Link to full changelog ### 3. Update Badge - Small badge on nav item - "1 new update" indicator - Clears when viewed ### 4. Email Digest (optional) - Monthly changelog email - Major updates only - For engaged users ## Changelog Entry Format ```markdown ## March 2026 ### New - **Collections Sharing**: Share entire collections with a link - **Dark Mode**: Toggle between light and dark themes ### Improved - Search is now 2x faster - Better mobile navigation ### Fixed - Fixed issue with export failing for large collections - Corrected billing date display ``` ## Database ```typescript export const changelogEntries = pgTable("changelog_entries", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), version: text("version"), // optional semver title: text("title").notNull(), content: text("content").notNull(), // markdown category: text("category").notNull(), // new, improved, fixed publishedAt: timestamp("published_at"), createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(), }); // Track which users have seen which entries export const changelogViews = pgTable("changelog_views", { userId: uuid("user_id").references(() => userProfiles.id), lastSeenEntryId: uuid("last_seen_entry_id"), seenAt: timestamp("seen_at").defaultNow(), }); ``` ## Files to Create - src/app/(public)/changelog/page.tsx - src/components/changelog/whats-new-modal.tsx - src/components/changelog/update-badge.tsx - content/changelog/*.mdx - src/app/api/changelog/route.ts ## Success Criteria - Changelog updated regularly - Users notified of changes - Easy to maintain - SEO-friendly ","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.107049999-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:59:54.703436949-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T10:59:54.703436949-05:00","close_reason":"Changelog page implemented at /changelog with version history, categorized changes, timeline design, and TypeScript-native data structure."}
